title: X-Morph: Human Motion Priors for Scalable Robot Learning Across Morphologies
title_zh: X-Morph：面向跨形态可扩展机器人学习的人体运动先验
abstract: Recent progress in humanoid behavior models has been driven in large part by abundant human motion data, but comparable motion data is scarce for non-humanoid legged robots such as quadrupeds, hexapods, and quadruped manipulators. A promising alternative is to repurpose human motion across embodiments; however, direct retargeting often produces motions that are visually plausible yet physically inconsistent or difficult to track under robot dynamics. We present X-Morph, a human-motion-to-robot-behavior pipeline that converts human motion into deployable locomotion and loco-manipulation policies for diverse non-humanoid legged morphologies. A cross-morphology retargeting stage converts human motions into kinematically plausible, intent-preserving robot references, which are then tracked by a privileged RL policy and distilled into a causal student policy. We evaluate X-Morph on three morphologically distinct platforms: a quadruped, a hexapod, and a quadruped equipped with a manipulator. The resulting policies track diverse retargeted motions, generalize to unseen human motions, and support downstream use cases including video-based teleoperation, behavior-prior control, and text-conditioned motion generation. These results suggest that large-scale human motion can serve as a substrate for learning broad, reusable behavior priors beyond humanoid robots. Project page: https://maker-rat.github.io/morph/
abstract_zh: 近期人形行为模型的进展很大程度上得益于丰富的人体运动数据，但对于非人形腿式机器人（如四足、六足和四足机械臂）而言，类似的数据却十分稀缺。一个可行的替代方案是跨形态重用人体运动；然而，直接重定向往往会产生视觉上合理但物理上不一致或难以在机器人动力学下跟踪的运动。我们提出X-Morph，一个将人体运动转化为适用于多种非人形腿式形态的可部署运动与运动-操作策略的流水线。跨形态重定向阶段将人体运动转化为运动学上合理、意图保留的机器人参考，随后由特权强化学习策略跟踪并蒸馏为因果学生策略。我们在三种形态不同的平台上评估X-Morph：四足机器人、六足机器人以及配备机械臂的四足机器人。所得策略能够跟踪多样化的重定向运动，泛化到未见的人体运动，并支持下游应用，包括基于视频的遥操作、行为先验控制以及文本条件运动生成。这些结果表明，大规模人体运动可以作为学习超越人形机器人的广泛、可重用行为先验的基础。项目页面：https://maker-rat.github.io/morph/
tldr_zh: 将人体运动转化为四足、六足等非人形机器人的可部署策略。
cover_zh: 人形运动数据太多？X-Morph让四足六足机器人也能直接学｜跨形态通用行为先验

score_breakdown.label: 关键词命中密集
score_breakdown.hint: 频道关键词命中 10 个（retargeting、loco-manipulation、loco-manip、humanoid robot）

judge.reason: 跨形态人体运动重定向到四足/六足/带臂四足，生成locomotion和loco-manipulation策略，具科研价值
